{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Remnant madra
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Remnant madra]] attacks the soul as much as the body.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
